text: - J. Deductibles/Retentions. Except as otherwise specified herein, no insurance required herein shall contain a deductible or self-insured retention in excess of $10,000 without prior written approval of Contractor. All deductibles and/or retentions shall be paid by, assumed by, for the account of, and at Subcontractor's sole risk. Subcontractor shall not be reimbursed for same. In addition, the Subcontractor acknowledges that the Builder's Risk or similar type property policy contains certain deductibles, which may apply to a loss. If the resulting  loss  was  caused  by,  in  whole  or  in  part,  the  Subcontractor's  failures,  the  Subcontractor  shall  be responsible  for  the  costs  of  the  deductible  and  promptly  remit  payment  to  Contractor  for  the  same. Otherwise, the Subcontractor shall be responsible for a pro-rata portion of the applicable deductible, shared with all other parties included in the loss.
